title: Validate Muzi Adafruit bootloader partition and UF2 layout on hardware
description: Why this exists: R1 Neo uses Muzi/Adafruit nRF52 bootloader and Zephyr app start/partition/UF2 metadata must match it. What needs to be done: confirm app offset, bootloader settings, UF2 family, and upload path for R1/R1 Neo, then encode them in Zephyr board files. Acceptance criteria: produced firmware can be flashed by the documented path and boot logs prove the app starts.
notes: Blocked for no-hardware execution on 2026-07-01: acceptance requires flashing/booting firmware with the Muzi/Adafruit bootloader and proving app startup on R1/R1 Neo hardware. No local R1 Neo hardware/UF2 bootloader volume/remote flashing access is available in this session; depends operationally on project-LICHEN-avrb.
